title: fix(core): emit tool-error chunk in fullStream when tool throws

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): throw tool execution errors instead of returning them

summary: This PR fixes tool execution errors being emitted as tool-result chunks instead of tool-error chunks in fullStream. It modifies the tool builder to throw errors (for v2/v3 AI SDK models) instead of returning them, and refactors the llm-mapping-step to properly separate error results from success results. Includes tests and a changeset. However, PR #13147 was merged on Feb 17, 2026 with a more focused one-liner fix to the same root cause (return→throw in builder.ts), making this PR superseded.
maintainerNotes: This PR is superseded by #13147 which was merged 2026-02-17. Both fix the same issue: tool errors appearing as tool-result instead of tool-error chunks. #13147 took a simpler approach (one-line change in builder.ts). This PR has merge conflicts and a failing E2E check. It also includes unrelated noise (examples/agent zod version bump, lockfile changes). Safe to close.
